testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.scheduler.ScheduleStoreTest

testcase.name: load returns null when file does not exist()
corrupt file returns null without throwing()
save and load round-trip preserves schedule()

testsuite.system-out: 21:13:38.740 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.scheduler.ScheduleStore -- schedule.json is corrupt, ignoring: Unexpected JSON token at offset 0: Expected start of the object '{', but had 't' instead at path: $ JSON input: this is not valid json {{{{
